summary: Session 19 Part 1 testing complete. ALL FEATURES VERIFIED: (1) Jest suite 161/161 tests passing (+6 share_remix tests), (2) Fix-a11y chip (data-testid='quick-action-fix-a11y') appears dynamically when CustomEvent 'emanator:a11y-result' is dispatched with violations > 0, (3) QuickActionChips subscribes to window.__EMANATOR_LATEST_A11Y__ and 'emanator:a11y-result' event, (4) PreviewTab broadcasts a11y results via window global + CustomEvent (lines 1088-1089), (5) Remix endpoint POST /api/shared/{token}/remix returns correct status codes (401 unauthenticated, 404 unknown token), (6) Remix button code verified in /app/share/[token]/page.jsx with data-testid='share-remix-btn' and GitFork icon, (7) Previously shipped features verified: Versions button, Backend button, Audit button, generic quick-action chips.
critical_code_review_comments: PASS: Jest suite 161/161 tests passing across 14 test files (+6 new share_remix tests)
PASS: QuickActionChips.jsx correctly subscribes to 'emanator:a11y-result' CustomEvent (lines 82-87)
PASS: QuickActionChips initializes a11yViolations from window.__EMANATOR_LATEST_A11Y__?.violations (lines 78-81)
PASS: Fix-a11y chip conditionally renders when a11yViolations.length > 0 (lines 110-121)
PASS: Fix-a11y chip has data-testid='quick-action-fix-a11y' and shows correct count
PASS: PreviewTab sets window.__EMANATOR_LATEST_A11Y__ = result (line 1088)
PASS: PreviewTab dispatches CustomEvent 'emanator:a11y-result' (line 1089)
PASS: POST /api/shared/{token}/remix endpoint implemented (share.js lines 143-201)
PASS: Remix endpoint returns 401 when unauthenticated
PASS: Remix endpoint returns 403 when not in allowlist
PASS: Remix endpoint returns 404 when token unknown
PASS: Remix endpoint returns 410 when preview expired
PASS: Remix endpoint clones files_snapshot into new project with remixed_from metadata
PASS: Share page has Remix button with data-testid='share-remix-btn' (page.jsx lines 165-186)
PASS: Remix button uses GitFork icon (line 183)
PASS: handleRemix redirects to /auth/login?next=/share/{token}?remix=1 on 401 (lines 50-53)
PASS: handleRemix redirects to /?project={newProjectId} on success (line 58)
PASS: Dashboard loads with no console errors
PASS: Versions button (hub-versions-btn) present
PASS: Backend button (hub-backend-btn) present
PASS: Audit button (preview-audit-a11y) present
PASS: Generic quick-action chips verified: add-feature, change-color, add-page, mobile-pass, copy-rewrite, tighten-ui
context_for_next_testing_agent: Session 19 Part 1 complete. Fix-a11y chip added to QuickActionChips - appears dynamically when a11y audit finds violations. Chip subscribes to 'emanator:a11y-result' CustomEvent and reads from window.__EMANATOR_LATEST_A11Y__. Remix endpoint added at POST /api/shared/{token}/remix - clones shared preview files into new project. Remix button added to /share/{token} page with GitFork icon. Jest suite at 161/161 tests across 14 test files. The test account (REDACTED_LEAKED_USER) has projects with built apps showing quick action chips.
